Meal Deal.title: Double Bundle
Meal Deal.description: Two burgers, two portion of fries, and two drinks 330ml can choices

Meal Deal.title: Meal Deal
Meal Deal.description: One burger choose from burger options, skin-on-fries (rusty natural fries), and a drink 330ml can choice

Build Your Taste.title: Rusty Natural Fries
Build Your Taste.description: Rustic, golden fries with the skin left on for extra flavor, texture-simple hearty and full of character in every bite

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Cajun Frenzy Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description:
Crispy fries tossed in a bold blend of cajun spices- smoky, garlicky, and just the
right amount of heat. Each bite delivers a fiery Southern kick. Simple yet spicy

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Jalapeño Bites
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Spice up your snack game with our jalapeno bites, crispy fried bites filled with a creamy jalapeno and cheese mixture. Perfect for those who like a little heat in their lives. Our jalapeno bites filled with a cream cheese and jalapeno mixture

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Mac N Cheese Croquettes
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Indulge in our creamy mac n cheese croquette, a crispy fried ball filled with a rich and creamy macaroni and cheese mixture. A comfort food classic turned into a crispy, golden snack

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Bombay Tikka Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Golden, crispy fries smothered in a rich, creamy tikka masala sauce bursting with bold spices and topped with fresh coriander and drizzle with crispy onion. A fiery fusion of comfort food and Indian flair in every bite

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Cheesy Meltstorm Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Golden fries smothered in a rich, melty cheese blend-gooey, indulgent, and impossible to resist. Every bite is a creamy and flavorful, perfect for cheese lovers and snack addicts alike

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Lava Cheesy Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy fries loaded with rich and spicy chili flakes and smothered in cheese- fiery, cheesy and totally satisfying. Perfect for those who crave heat and heartiness in every bite

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Chilli Crunch Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Golden fries layered with a spicy chili crunch and a smooth kick of creamy mayo topped with a sprinkle of black and white sesame seeds for an added layer of texture and flavor. The perfect balance of spice, crunch and creaminess

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Buffalo Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy fries showered with tangy, spicy buffalo sauce, balance with a touch of buttery richness. Finished with sprinkle with fresh chives

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Creamy Garlic Crunch Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy golden fries drizzled with creamy garlic sauce and sprinkle of herbs and crunchy onion delivering a smooth, tangy kick with every bite

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Halloumi Heat Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Thick-cut strips of golden, crispy halloumi- fried for perfection. Salty, squeky, and satisfyingly crunchy, these fries bring bold Mediterranean flavor with a touch of indulgent flair

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Seoul Fire Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy fries loaded with sweet and spicy gochujang mayo and topped with sesame seeds. K-style comfort with a crunchy kick

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Rusty Natural Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Rustic, golden fries with the skin left on for extra flavor, texture-simple hearty and full of character in every bite

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Truffle Parmesan Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy golden fries kissed with aromatic truffle mayo, showered in finely grated Parmesan. Earthy, rich and elegant- these fries bring luxury to every bote

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Frenzied Black Garlic Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy golden fries showered with rich, umami-packed black garlic sauce and finished with sprinkle of sea salt and chives. Deep, slightly sweet and full of earthy flavor

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Waffle Frenzy Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy golden waffle fries tossed with sea salt

Loaded Signature Fries.title: BBQ Blaze Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy fries loaded with smoky, sweet barbecue sauce and topped with crunchy golden onion

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Blaze of Nashville Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Crispy fries drenched in a fiery, smoky Nashville hot sauce, creating an intense, spicy kick with each bite

Loaded Signature Fries.title: Hot Honey Fries
Loaded Signature Fries.description: Our crispy, golden fries cooked to a perfect crunch . Spicy and sweet hot honey sauce with a hint of smoky heat

Burgers.title: Frenzy Cheeseburger
Burgers.description: Two juicy beef patties dripping with melted cheese slice, stacked with crunchy pickles, and a zesty house-made burger sauce-all tucked in a toasted brioche bun. It will be a perfect pair with our signature fiery fries

Burgers.title: Frenzy Buffalo Chicken Burger
Burgers.description: A tender, juicy chicken breast, crispy-fried to perfection, topped with fresh lettuce, frenzy buffalo sauce, and touch of specially marinated onion. Served on toasted bun

Burgers.title: Frenzy BBQ Blaze Cheeseburger
Burgers.description: Two juicy beef patties layered with American cheese slices, smoky BBQ sauce and topped with crispy onions, all tucked inside toasted brioche bun. Its packed with bold BBQ flavor in every bite

Burgers.title: Bombay Classic Veg Burger
Burgers.description: A hearty patty made with a blend of fresh veggies fried to perfection and topped with fresh aromatic coriander leaves and crispy fried onion and special frenzy vegan mayo nestled between a soft, toasted bun

Burgers.title: Frenzy Chipotle Chicken Burger
Burgers.description: A juicy chicken breast topped with spicy jalapeno, fresh lettuce and tangy chipotle mayo all nestled between a soft, toasted bun

Burgers.title: Frenzy Buffalo Cheeseburger
Burgers.description: Our bold and fiery cheeseburger featuring two juicy beef patties layered with American cheese slices, crunchy pickles, crispy lettuce, and our special Buffalo sauce all tucked inside toasted brioche bun. Its packed with bold flavor in every bite

Burgers.title: Frenzy Nashville Chicken Burger
Burgers.description: A tender, juicy chicken breast, crispy-fried to perfection, topped with fresh lettuce, spicy Nashville sauce, and touch of specially marinated onion. Served on toasted bun. Simple, yet flavorful and satisfying

Burgers.title: Frenzy Korean BBQ Chicken Burger
Burgers.description: A succulent chicken breast glazed with Korean BBQ sauce, topped with creamy gochujang mayo

Burgers.title: Frenzy Tikka Burger
Burgers.description: Juicy chicken breast marinated with creamy tikka masala sauce and layered with fresh lettuce, onions, coriander salad and served in a soft toasted bun for the perfect fusion of flavor and spice

Chicken Wings.title: Fiery Buffalo Wings
Chicken Wings.description: Warning: very spicy! Tender chicken wings tossed in signature Buffalo sauce, topped with hot chilies for a fiery kick

Chicken Wings.title: Truffle Frenzy Wings
Chicken Wings.description: Crispy wings covered in a velvety truffle mayo and finished with generous dusting of aged Parmesan

Chicken Wings.title: Fiery Honey Wings
Chicken Wings.description: Crispy, golden-fried wings glazed in a sweet and spicy hot honey sauce. The perfect fusion of sticky sweetness and slow-building heat made to tingle your taste buds

Chicken Wings.title: Garlic Frenzy Wings
Chicken Wings.description: Crispy golden wings showered with rich garlic butter sauce and finished with generous dusting of aged Parmesan and sprinkle with herbs. Bold, savory and addictively delicious

Chicken Wings.title: Smoky Frenzy BBQ Wings
Chicken Wings.description: Tender, juicy wings coated in smoky-sweet BBQ sauce with perfect balance of sweet and tangy

Chicken Wings.title: Fiery Bold Wings
Chicken Wings.description: Bold and fiery! Crispy wings showered with zesty, tangy hot sauce that punch of heat and flavor

Drinks.title: Fanta Orange
Drinks.description: A 330 ml can bursting with bold orange flavor. Sweet, citrusy - Fanta orange brings a splash of sunshine in every sip

Drinks.title: Coke
Drinks.description: A refreshing 330 ml can of the classic, crisp, bubbly Coca-Cola

Drinks.title: Sprite
Drinks.description: 330 ml. This is cool, lemon-lime refreshment

Drinks.title: Red Bull
Drinks.description: 250 ml. This iconic energy drink revitalizes body and mind, keeping you sharp and energized

Drinks.title: Diet Coke
Drinks.description: A refreshing 330 ml can of The Iconic sugar-free cola. Light, crisp and refreshing

Drinks.title: Still Water
Drinks.description: 500 ml. A refreshing bottle of pure still water-crisp, clean and perfect to keep you hydrated anytime

Drinks.title: Sparkling Water
Drinks.description: 330 ml. Light, bubbly and perfect as palate cleanser or a refreshing sip on its own

Drinks.title: San Pellegrino Orange
Drinks.description: A 330 ml can of premium Italian sparkling orange beverage. Made with Italian oranges and offer perfect balance of sweet, citrus flavor and lively bubbles-refreshingly sophisticated with every sip

Drinks.title: San Pellegrino Lemon
Drinks.description: 330 ml. This premium Italian soft drink made with lemon juice for bold and tangy flavor

Drinks.title: San Pellegrino Blood Orange
Drinks.description: 330 ml. This one is can of vibrant sparkling blood orange beverage made with real Italian oranges and blood orange juice. Bold, and refreshingly citrusy

Drinks.title: Capri Sun Orange
Drinks.description: A 200 ml pouch of fruity fun, bursting with sweet and tangy taste of real orange juice

Dips.title: Frenzy Chipotle Dip
Dips.description: Creamy, smoky and just the right amount of heat. This goes perfectly with crispy fries and loaded burgers

Dips.title: Frenzy Garlic Dip
Dips.description: A luxurious mayo that pairs beautifully with crispy fries or juicy burgers

Dips.title: Frenzy Truffle Dip
Dips.description: Rich and savory dip to elevate your taste of fries or burger

Desserts.title: Oreo Milkshake
Desserts.description: Real vanilla ice cream and cold milk spun with plenty of Oreo cookies until thick, creamy, and speckled with crunchy bits

Desserts.title: Strawberry Milkshake
Desserts.description: Real strawberries, vanilla ice cream, and milk blended thick

Desserts.title: Biscoff Milkshake
Desserts.description: Caramelized biscuit bliss in every sip – plenty of Lotus Biscoff cookies spun with real vanilla ice cream and chilled milk for a thick, spiced, toffee-kissed shake.
